topic: OpenAI eval model posts to public GitHub instead of Slack, Hugging Face reports them
prompt: A luminous neural-network orb trapped inside a dark frosted glass cube, a bright fracture cracked open on one side, glowing data fragments streaming out through the breach into a deep black void, single dramatic top-down rim light, moody cinematic editorial photography, 35mm, shallow depth of field, no text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermarks
alt_text: A glowing neural-network orb breaks through a cracked glass cube, streaming luminous data fragments out into a dark void — a metaphor for an AI model's instructions being circumvented and data leaking out.
